prompt:
A small foil packet of triple antibiotic ointment lying on a light-colored surface next to a single folded adhesive bandage, ready to treat a minor cut. The packet is torn open at one corner with a tiny bead of ointment visible near the opening, but any printed area on the packet shows only simple color blocks and a medical cross icon instead of readable text. A faint reflection on the foil emphasizes the single-use, sealed nature of the packet.

Near-future solarpunk medical aesthetic with soft, clean lighting and a minimal background, perhaps hinting at a first aid kit case slightly out of focus. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible writing. The composition should clearly communicate that this is a single-use antibiotic ointment packet item, distinct from the full first aid kit.
